# Data Model: mos_target_instrument_parquet


MOS Target Table: instrument

- [Basic Information](#basic-information)

## Basic Information
This table stores the instruments used by SDSS-V.

### Naming Convention
$MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_instrument.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

### Releases
DR20

### Enviroments
MOS_TARGET

### Approximate Size
1 KB

### File Type
PARQUET

### Generated by Product
sdss5db targeting database.

### Is a VAC
False

### Data Level
2.3.3

### DATAFRAME List for release DR20
- Primary data frame.

---

## Changelog
Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

---
## Example DATAFRAME List

### Columns


#### pk

- Column Name: pk
- Description: The primary key. A sequential identifier.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### label

- Column Name: label
- Description: The name of the instrument.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### default_lambda_eff

- Column Name: default_lambda_eff
- Description: The default wavelength for which fibre positioning will be optimised
- Unit: angstrom
- Data Type: Float32
